verdict_reasoning: SRC is a cytoplasmic non-receptor tyrosine kinase canonically anchored to the inner leaflet of the plasma membrane via N-terminal myristoylation and palmitoylation. Its primary localization is cytoplasmic/inner-leaflet. However, there is documented evidence of SRC ecto-display on the outer leaflet of cancer cells (cancer ecto-kinase phenomenon), where it can be targeted by extracellular antibodies. This oncogenic-state outer-leaflet presentation qualifies as cell_state_induced contextual surface accessibility, even though the baseline localization is inner-leaflet-anchored/cytoplasmic.
